reviews.comment:
La Estación de Servicio del ACA de Tortugas ofrece una atención regular, lenta. Es una pena que en plena época de Turismo  la atención sea deficitaria.

(Translated by Google)
The ACA service station in Tortugas offers mediocre, albeit slow, service. It's a shame that the service is so poor during peak tourist season.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzaUpQTjd3RRAB

(Translated by Google)
Good service, good price, nice place

reviews.comment:
estación de servicio para descansar y estirar las piernas, comimos unos sanguches de jamon crudo y queso que nos habian recomendado, estaban bien, pero algo caros$240 cada uno, tenia abundante jamon crudo, pero de queso bien y gracias, una feta. (SI TE SIRVIÓ LA INFO CON LA CARTA, TE AGRADECERÍA QUE ME LO HAGAS SABER CON UN LIKE , GRACIAS Y SALUDOS)

(Translated by Google)
A gas station to rest and stretch our legs. We ate some raw ham and cheese sandwiches that had been recommended to us. They were good, but a bit pricey at $240 each. It had plenty of raw ham, but good cheese, and, thank you, a feta cheese. (If the information on the menu was helpful, I'd appreciate it if you'd let me know with a like. Thank you and best regards.)

reviewReply.comment: Yesica gracias por su visita y puntuación.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzcjdXS0pBEAE

reviews.comment:
A sólo 2 km de la autopista Córdoba-Rosario. Bien ubicado,para cargar combustible. Muy  buena atención,personal muy amable, baños muy limpios. Espacio con mesas bajos los árboles, como para "estirarse" un poco y seguir viaje.

(Translated by Google)
Just 2 km from the Córdoba-Rosario Highway. Conveniently located for fueling up. Excellent service, very friendly staff, and very clean bathrooms. There's a space with tables under the trees, perfect for stretching out before continuing your journey.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzLTRLYU1nEAE
